descriptions.belly_pain: Intense, high-pitched rhythmic cry — often signals tummy/gas pain
descriptions.burping: Short, sporadic cry with pauses — baby likely needs to be burped
descriptions.discomfort: Moderate-intensity whining cry — environmental discomfort (wet, cold, hot)
descriptions.tired: Weak, whimpering, low-energy cry — baby needs sleep

note: belly_pain/discomfort and tired/hungry share acoustic features — low-confidence predictions between these pairs are expected.
